query: INSERT INTO atolls (name, slug, region, description, overview, bestFor, highlights, activities, accommodation, transportation, bestSeason, published, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('Fuvahmulah Atoll', 'fuvahmulah-atoll', 'South', 'Fuvahmulah is a unique atoll in the southernmost region of the Maldives, known for its pristine beaches and exclusive resorts.', 'Fuvahmulah Atoll is the southernmost atoll in the Maldives, featuring pristine white-sand beaches, crystal-clear waters, and exclusive luxury resorts. This remote destination offers an authentic Maldivian experience with fewer tourists and more natural beauty.', 'luxury stays, exclusive resorts, pristine beaches, diving', '[{"title":"Exclusive Resorts","description":"World-class luxury resorts with overwater villas and private beaches"},{"title":"Pristine Beaches","description":"Untouched white-sand beaches with turquoise waters"},{"title":"Diving Paradise","description":"Excellent dive sites with abundant marine life"},{"title":"Remote Destination","description":"Fewer tourists and more authentic Maldivian experience"}]', '[{"title":"🤿 Diving","description":"World-class dive sites with pristine coral reefs and marine life"},{"title":"🏝️ Beach Relaxation","description":"Pristine white-sand beaches and crystal-clear waters"},{"title":"🐠 Snorkeling","description":"Excellent snorkeling opportunities from resort beaches"},{"title":"🌅 Water Sports","description":"Jet skiing, parasailing, and other water activities"},{"title":"🏨 Luxury Resorts","description":"Exclusive resort experiences with premium amenities"}]', '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Premium resorts with overwater villas and world-class amenities","priceRange":"$800-$3000 per night"},{"type":"Resort Islands","description":"Exclusive island resorts with private beaches","priceRange":"$600-$2500 per night"},{"type":"Boutique Resorts","description":"Smaller luxury resorts with personalized service","priceRange":"$400-$1500 per night"}]', 'Approximately 1 hour by seaplane from Malé International Airport', 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination', 1, NOW(), NOW());
